# Oximy Gateway

> The unified, fastest, open-source LLM + MCP gateway. Single Rust binary,
> embedded dashboard, agent-first control plane.

Oximy Gateway routes LLM calls and MCP tool calls through one shared governance
spine: one virtual key covers both, one audit log spans both, one guardrail policy
applies to both.

- Repo: https://github.com/OximyHQ/gateway
- License: Apache-2.0
- Status: alpha

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): Overview, quickstart, feature list, architecture diagram
- [Quickstart](docs/guide/quickstart.md): Install, boot, first request, dashboard tour, mint a key
- [Configuration](docs/guide/configuration.md): Env vars, oximy-gateway.json, hot reload, env interpolation
- [Providers](docs/guide/providers.md): Supported providers, how to enable each, base-URL override, model registry
- [Keys & Budgets](docs/guide/keys-budgets.md): Virtual keys, USD budgets, rate limits, model allowlists, keys CLI
- [Guardrails](docs/guide/guardrails.md): PII/secrets detection, enforcement modes, pipeline stages
- [MCP Gateway](docs/guide/mcp.md): POST /mcp, server federation, tool ACLs, connecting clients
- [Observability](docs/guide/observability.md): Prometheus metrics, request log, cost headers, health check
- [Deployment](docs/guide/deployment.md): Binary, Docker, reverse proxy, TLS, systemd, persistence

## Key facts for agents

- Binary: `oximy-gateway`
- Boot command: `oximy-gateway up [--port 8080] [--host 127.0.0.1] [--dir PATH] [--no-open]`
- First boot prints a one-time admin key (shown once; store it)
- All `/v1/*`, `/metrics`, and `/mcp` endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <key>`
- `GET /health` is unauthenticated (liveness probe)
- Provider keys set via env: `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `GEMINI_API_KEY`, `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`, and more
- `OPENAI_BASE_URL` overrides the OpenAI transport base URL (Ollama, vLLM, Azure, etc.)

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /v1/chat/completions | Bearer | OpenAI-compatible chat, supports streaming |
| POST | /v1/responses | Bearer | OpenAI Responses API |
| POST | /v1/messages | Bearer | Anthropic Messages API |
| POST | /v1/embeddings | Bearer | Embeddings (returns 501 in alpha) |
| GET | /v1/models | Bearer | Model registry with pricing |
| GET | /metrics | Bearer | Prometheus / OpenMetrics |
| GET | /health | None | Liveness probe |
| POST | /mcp | Bearer | JSON-RPC 2.0 MCP gateway |
| GET | / | None | Embedded dashboard |

## Response metadata

Every `/v1/*` response includes:
- `usage.cost` (USD, exact) in the body
- `x-overhead-duration-ms` header (gateway self-overhead)
- `x-served-by` header (provider/model)
- `x-fallback-fired` header (boolean)
- `x-idempotency-key` header

## Design document

[docs/2026-06-10-oximy-gateway-design.md](docs/2026-06-10-oximy-gateway-design.md)
Full architecture, module decomposition, spine invariants, phase roadmap.

## Contributing

[CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): DCO sign-off required; TDD workflow; lint with
`cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]` everywhere.

[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Spine invariants that must not be violated, CLI/AX
conventions, PR checklist.
